title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
expected_result: Login query results contain only users where deletedAt is null.

title: EP: Login with active user (deletedAt null) succeeds
precondition: A user account exists with valid credentials and deletedAt is null
test_steps:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter valid credentials for the active user
3. Submit login form

title: DT: Rule 2 – Login performed, user soft‑deleted → exclude
precondition: A user account exists with deletedAt set and valid credentials
test_steps: 1. Initiate login query for the user with valid credentials
expected_result: User record is excluded from login query; authentication fails.

title: DT: Rule 1 – Login performed, user not soft‑deleted → include
precondition: A user account exists with deletedAt null and valid credentials
test_steps: 1. Initiate login query for the user with valid credentials
expected_result: User record is included in login query; authentication succeeds.
